name: dakshina-rajya
description: Dakshina Rajya — a multiplayer turn-based strategy board game of the 5th-century South Indian kingdoms.

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n shared,server,client -c magenta,cyan,green "npm:dev:shared" "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
